title: Tree Felling
description: Trees fall like sand, making them easier to fell.
body:
> # Don't forget to say "Timber!" > ## Beware falling branches, heard they smite like an anvil. Tree Felling is a small and lightweight mod which makes trees fall like sand and gravel when broken by a player. Trees generated by the world will not work if the world has been generated already. Though new trees via saplings will work without a new world.
To note, the forge version is lacking the features of:
* Working solely on trees. * Falling logs hurting entities
Showcases:
1. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vrZa45IpGjw 2. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rO3S7EZ3sgY 3. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lWXSbTWCklc
The Main Author & Owner is: Knightmere, TrialDragon is only the porter to Fabric & Maintainer of the Modrinth page.
Thanks to Haven King for creating the TreeFax library which this mod uses.
